title: Test tdd-plan CLI Tool
context: Verify that the tdd-plan CLI tool works correctly: create, list, show, phase, complete, note, and archive commands. This is a smoke test / integration test of the tool itself to validate it functions as documented in the SKILL.md.
architecture: Exercise each CLI command sequentially, verifying output and side effects (file creation, status transitions).

red.description: Run tdd-plan create with a known slug, title, and steps JSON. Assert: exit code 0, file .pi/plans/test-smoke.json exists, and tdd-plan list shows the slug.

green.description: Run: tdd-plan create test-smoke --title Smoke Test --steps [{"name":"Step 1: Hello","red":"fail","green":"pass","refactor":""}] . Verify exit 0 and file exists.

refactor.description: Clean up the test plan after verification if needed.

red.description: Run tdd-plan list. Assert: output contains the test-smoke slug. Also verify it lists the tdd-plan-cli plan.

green.description: Run tdd-plan list and visually confirm both test-smoke and tdd-plan-cli appear.

red.description: Run tdd-plan show test-smoke. Assert: output includes the title Smoke Test and the step name Step 1: Hello.

green.description: Run tdd-plan show test-smoke and verify the title and step content are printed.

refactor.description: Also test tdd-plan show without a slug — should default to most recent plan.

red.description: Run tdd-plan phase test-smoke 1 red start. Assert: step 1 shows red phase started. Then run tdd-plan phase test-smoke 1 red done and assert phase completed.

green.description: Execute phase commands in sequence: red start → red done → green start → green done → refactor start → refactor done. Verify each transition.

red.description: Run tdd-plan complete test-smoke 1. Assert: step 1 is marked complete in the plan output.

green.description: Run tdd-plan complete test-smoke 1 then tdd-plan show test-smoke to verify step status is complete.

red.description: Run tdd-plan note test-smoke "This is a test note". Assert: note appears in tdd-plan show test-smoke output.

green.description: Add note, then show plan and confirm the note text is present.

red.description: Run tdd-plan archive test-smoke. Assert: .pi/plans/test-smoke.* is moved to .pi/plans/archive/ and tdd-plan list no longer shows test-smoke.

green.description: Archive the plan, verify it moved to archive dir, verify it disappeared from list.

refactor.description: Clean up the archived test file if desired.

red.description: Run tdd-plan show nonexistent-plan. Assert: non-zero exit code or clear error message. Run tdd-plan create with missing --title. Assert: error or usage output.

green.description: Test invalid inputs and confirm the CLI handles them gracefully without unexpected crashes.

notes: This plan is self-referential — we use tdd-plan to test tdd-plan
The test-smoke slug is used as throwaway test data and should be cleaned up
phase and complete commands were discovered via --help but not in SKILL.md — verify they match documentation
Steps JSON uses string step indices — verify if numeric or named references work
